feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Technology Platform
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Technology Platform Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Omnichannel Promotion Pricing BTP - SD integration
entry.content:
Hi gurus, 

I am trying to understand more about possiblities of BTP SAP Omnichannel promotion pricing and its integration to SD sales orders. 

Pricing Configuration for Use of Omnichannel Sales Promotions

I cannot see the example pricing procedure RVOCP1 (omnichannel sales promotions) in the list of pricing procedures of my S4 HANA 2023 system. I have activated the business function for Omnichnanel pricing for Sales documents. The link to sap help on this topic is here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/7b24a64d9d0941bda1afa753263d9e39/808069d398e4423dac9f56b0ec6275cd.html

BTP and S4 HANA cloud integration

I understand that the calculation service from SD sales order would be triggered during the sales order processing. I can only guess that is is based on RFC connection maintained in SM59 where we specify the linkage with BTP. The RFC connection is then maintained in Omnichannel promotion pricing configuration in SPRO. 

However, when maintaining the promotion on BTP level, I need to specify the master data source system. This filed is free text without any search help. How the application knows which system calls the calculation service? Where is this source system maintained in BTP? 

Note:I have maintained the connection to S4 system in the Connectivity/Destinations section of my subaccount.

entry.title: Can we run same application in neo and cloud foundry environment simultaneously?
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to run similar application in neo and cloud foundry environment and have workflow approval scenarios in place. is it possible to run this in both neo and cloud foundry launchpad?

Thanks.

Siddhant

entry.title: Hi, I am unable to capture combo box and drop down using SAP BPA desktop studio for SAP fiori APP.
entry.content:
Hi, when I was trying to do UI automation of SAP Fiori application using SAP business process automation desktop studio, I am facing the issue mentioned in the subject.

It is not capturing the required fields and objects.

Can you guide me how can I do it.

@Chaitanya_Priya @peterengel @BorisAndree 

I am trying to work on this screen

and using these options from Desktop studio:

entry.title: BTP Trial - BAS Full Stack Project - error compiling CDS with 4.9.6
entry.content: The BAS will not show the Entity or Service graphical modeler and gives an "error compiling CDS with 4.9.6" message.  How to fix this?

entry.title: Travel expenses payment in foreign currency - PR05
entry.content:
Hi,
can you help me with the following problem?
The company is based in UK, some workers are based in Ireland. Payment is in GBP but for the workers from Ireland, some travel expenses must be payed in EURO.
When this happens, the complete travel expense claim is in Euro.

In SPRO > Financial Accounting (New) > Travel Management > Travel Expenses > Master Data > Control Parameters for Travel Expenses > Define Global Settings, I made the changes as shown:

In PR05, I can change the accounting to EUR

But in the overview, it remains in GBP for the whole trip

Is there a way to switch this to EUR?

entry.title: How can I get full logs of Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
Dear BTP experts,

I'm currently using CF CLI command "cf logs" to get an application log. The log output command "cf logs" of the CF command, but I am not sure whether it can or cannot log for a specified time or period of time.

The option '--recent' is also not clear as to which period of time can be logged.

Therefore, can anyone tell me how long the logging period is when the command is executed?

entry.title: CSV attachment gets generated with no content while sending it via mail adapter in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi,

Currently, I am sending an error email notification with the CSV attachment. The attachment gets generated with no content. Can anyone please help me to resolve this issue. 

Regards,

Carol

entry.title: api Business Role - Read
entry.content:
Buenos días, alguien se ha conectado a la API Business Role - Read (Try Out | Rol de Negocio - Leer | SAP Business Accelerator Hub)? , tengo la duda porque cuando se hace la prueba incluso desde la página del hub de SAP Business Accelerator sale el error de autenticación, ¿tal vez alguien sabe cómo solucionarlo?

{
  "error": {
    "code": "/IWBEP/CM_V4_COS/011",
    "message": "No authorization to access service group 'APS_IAM_API_BROLE_READ'",
    "@SAP__common.ExceptionCategory": "Authorization_Error",
    "innererror": {
      "ErrorDetails": {
        "@SAP__common.Application": {
          "ComponentId": "BC-SRV-APS-IAM",
          "ServiceRepository": "SRVD_A2X",
          "ServiceId": "APS_IAM_API_BROLE_READ",
          "ServiceVersion": "0001"
        },
        "@SAP__common.TransactionId": "25669476CF940270E0066999F2D658D5",
        "@SAP__common.Timestamp": "20240719144729.364287",
        "@SAP__common.ErrorResolution": {
          "Analysis": "Use ADT feed reader \"SAP Gateway Error Log\" or run transaction /IWFND/ERROR_LOG on SAP Gateway hub system and search for entries with the timestamp above for more details",
          "Note": "See SAP Note 1797736 for error analysis (https://service.sap.com/sap/support/notes/1797736)"
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
I am very grateful if you can help me!

entry.title: Issues with Contact numbers appearing as link
entry.content:
Hello Community,

In BPA mail body, contact numbers are displayed as link and I have attempted various method to ensure that it does not appear as link, all to no avail. I have also used decision logic to pass fixed numbers and type the + directly to the mail body, still it came as link. The only way around was to remove the plus sign + which is a requirement for the contact numbers and would not serve as a solution for us.

Does anyone know a way to resolve this issue? Looking forward to your contributions. Thank you

entry.title: Can we add password authentication to Sap Application Studio Solutions?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Can we add password authentication to Sap Application Studio Solutions?

We would like to create a Multi Customer Solution and would like to ask if we can put a password authentication to it so that no one can see the source code / scripts once deployed in different tenants?

Is it also possible in Customer Specific Solutions?

 

Thank you and Regards,

Carlo

entry.title: S4 HANA Public Cloud : How to create Fiori tiles for BTP -BPA form triggers for automations
entry.content:
Hello Community,

We have built form trigger for a process automation that we have built on BTP -Build process automation, we are able to test the form trigger with the generated Url link for the form.

But how can we create a Fiori tile on S4 HANA public cloud Fiori launch pad for this BPA form  where the business users can have access to these tile and trigger the automations.

We have tried to create tile using Custom Catalog but question here is that we can give a static Url in the custom catalog app, but when the BTP sub account is different is for Dev and Prod environments then BPA form link will also be changing. in this case how can we create a Fiori tile which will dynamically points to the correct BPA form in all the environments ( Dev and prod).

SAP Build Process Automation  SAP Build SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP Fiori

entry.title: sap mobile start - how to create a tile to launch custom app developed using mdk in sap bas?
entry.content:
I have followed few developer tutorials:

https://developers.sap.com/mission.mobile-dev-kit-enhance.html

https://developers.sap.com/mission.mobile-dev-kit-enhance.html

https://developers.sap.com/mission.mobile-dev-kit-level-up.html

Following above tutorials I created many mdk apps with systems SampleServiceV4 & swagger_petstore

I googled a lot but surprisingly I did not see any blog explaining creating tile selecting 'system' for sap mobile start

this below blog has shown creating tile selecting "no system"

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-mobile-start-adding-native-apps-to-your-content/ba-p/13515218

providing additional details below:

bas project folder with apps developed using mdk:

destination:

mobile services native/mdk:

project.json of app

launchpad is sap mobile start enabled.

app configuration (content manager / demo), system available for selection:

 

what should be correct selection for 'app ui technology' ?

if i select sap ui5, it asks for component id. what should i provide in component id?

if i select 'dynamic url' , what should be the url?

 

Please help in this regard.

@dennis_koehler 

@SAPSupport

entry.title: SAP Business One Customer Overpayment Allocation
entry.content:
Dear SAP Business One Experts,

I have a situation where I am getting some excess payments from our customers. I need to transfer it to a Specific GL account in the same receipt (Incoming payment)

Eg: Outstanding Invoice is 100 USD, Customer pays 102 USD. I need to transfer excess payment of 2 USD to a GL account in the same incoming payment and  GL entries should be generated as follows

Bank Dr 103, Customer Cr 100 and assigned GL account Cr 3

 

Thanks in Advance

Sam

entry.title: SAP Build process Automation - How to execute automations with recorded screens in Background mode
entry.content:
Hello Experts,@Archana , @botazhat , @Chaitanya_Priya ,

We have a business use case to run the BPA automations to run in unattended mode which also in a background mode ( similar to Background jobs in SAP).

We have created an automation using screen capture option and recorded the Fiori app screens for asset distribution rules( App id : AIBU) on S4 HANA public cloud system, and we have created an process automation to read the data from a file and pass the data into this automation so that the bot can copy the data from file to the app AIBU and post the data in S4 system.

The automation is working fine end to end but its getting executed in fore ground in User machine on a browser window.

The question here is is it possible to schedule this automation as a background job in unattended mode so that this Job can run every day at given frequency and post the data in S4 system in AIBU application.

System details:

S4 HANA public cloud 2402

BPA desktop agent version: 3.24.54

Thanks a lot in advance.

SAP Build Process Automation SAP Business Technology Platform SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Q) How to create API services and use them in SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
Question

I want to practice creating APIs in the API Services tab of the Manage Service Registry App. However, it is difficult to develop a service that goes into URL/Path.

I'd like to have basic and sequential examples and guides. If possible, I would like to use the Visual Studio Code as IDE for service development.

Furthermore, where can we use custom API if it is possible to create them? Does creating API mean custom APIs are uploaded to the endpoint and possible to use like provided-APIs during plugin development?

 

FYI, Background

I''m a beginner of SAP Digital Manufacturing and IT. I've developed few view-plugs with SAPUI5 and Visual Studio Code(IDE) and expanded them to DM POD. The plugins I made can get or post with provided APIs. I uploaded my custom POD to BTP sub-account and registered that route in the UI Extension tab of the Manage Service Registry. I've only developed plug-ins in the view format.

 

Kind regards,

SAP Digital Manufacturing

entry.title: I have deployed a srv and ui with in memory db but still showing error.
entry.content:
I have created a Service Books using cds and added Ui with freestyle View that shows list of Books .It deployed successfully but showing error.

1) on opening of Ui

 

2)on opening of srv application.

 

please help how to solve this error.It is working fine in development

entry.title: Integrating SAP BTP Cockpit with SSO
entry.content:
We have the desire to integrate our SAML Identity Provider to the login of SAP BTP Cockpit.

We wanted to know if this is possible, because we couldn't find any configuration related to the login parameters of SAP BTP Cockpit.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Unable to subscribe SAP Build Process Automation in trial account.
entry.content: I am unable to subscribe SAP Build Process Automation in my trial account. Checked with the entitlements, it is still showing subscription failed.

entry.title: SAP Build Workzone Subscription Failed
entry.content:
HI  Experts, I am using my Trial Account in SAP BTP, When I'm trying to create a instance/subscription for SAP Build Workzone , I'm getting error as such

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Getting error as such 'Service broker error: Service broker portal responded with invalid JSON: 404 Not Found: Requested route ('portal-service.cert.cfapps.us10.hana.ondemand.com') does not exist.' I have installed the Cloud Identity Services also, but still facing this issue.Kindly Help

entry.title: Integration suite is Unsubscription failed showing in trail account.
entry.content:
I have created a trial account and subscribed to the integration suite service. The Integration suite could be showing unsubscription failed. And not open.

Couldn't unsubscribe from Integration Suite. Please try again. If the problem persists, post a question in the SAP Community.

I tried it several times yesterday and today.

Is there any idea to resolve the problem.
